long_description:
NRE were alerted of link flaps between ngas03.sr01.syd05 Et3/27/1 <-> ngcs196.1.sr01.syd05 Et17/1. Raising this INC to track progress.


https://github.ibm.com/IaaS-NRE/nreincidents/issues/19943
